title: aira canescens
intro: Aira canescens, also known as silvery hair grass, is a type of flowering plant in the grass family Poaceae. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Aira canescens include reducing inflammation, relieving congestion, and soothing the respiratory system. Aira canescens can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
